probes.name: event-tables-migrated
probes.description: The `events` + `event_facilities` tables exist with the latest schema.

probes.name: event-tenant-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every events.tenant_id + event_facilities.tenant_id resolves to a live tenants row.

probes.name: event-organization-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every events.organization_id resolves to a live organizations row.

probes.name: event-primary-facility-invariant
probes.description: Every event with active event_facilities rows has EXACTLY one is_primary=true. Backed by partial unique index; probe catches drift from bulk imports.

probes.name: event-slug-uniqueness
probes.description: No two active events share (tenant_id, organization_id, slug). Verifies the partial unique index is healthy.

probes.name: event-date-consistency
probes.description: For every event: ends_at >= starts_at; when set, registration_opens_at <= registration_closes_at <= starts_at. Catches raw-SQL drift.

probes.name: event-phase-roll-heartbeat
probes.description: RollEventStatusJob ran successfully within the last 90 minutes.

probes.name: event-facility-booking-drift
probes.description: Every active event_facilities row has a matching resource_booking spanning the event window. Populated by ReconcileEventFacilityBookingsJob. Reports drifted rows.

probes.name: event-purge-queue-drained
probes.description: No PurgeArchivedEventsJob has been pending for > 48h.

probes.name: event-inbound-fk-drift
probes.description: No Session / EventTeam / AthleteEnrollment row references a hard-deleted Event.
